items.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
items.summary: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Musk quietly buys APR Energy in $1B deal to power Grok
items.summary: Elon Musk's APR Energy acquisition, worth over $1 billion, gives him a 1 GW mobile turbine fleet to power xAI's Grok data centres.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OnePlus never had a chance in the US
items.summary: After an eight-year run, OnePlus announced today that it has exited the United States. It's bittersweet, as the brand has been on a comeback tour of sorts with its excellent One...
